docs.title: 📖 Vocabulary Notes
docs.text:
Personal Japanese vocabulary notes saved via the Telegram bot.

Each note includes: - 分詞解析 (word breakdown) - 意思 (meaning) - 文法 (auxiliary verb analysis) - 例句 (example sentence + English translation) - 参考 (Kotobank + Weblio references)

Use the search bar to find any word.| かく | かく | daily | 2026-05-23 | | 書く | かく | daily | 2026-05-23 | | こえ | こえ | textbook | 2026-05-23 |

docs.title: 📖 Textbook Notes
docs.text: Word Reading Date こえ こえ 2026-05-23

docs.title: 分詞解析
docs.text: 表面形 讀音 詞性 原形 こえ こえ 名詞 声

docs.title: 意思 (Meaning)
docs.text: 声: voice, singing (of a bird), chirping (of an insect), hoot, voice, opinion (as expressed in words), view, wish, attitude, will, sound, sense (of something's arrival), feeling, voice, voiced sound

docs.title: 例句 (Example)
docs.text:
彼は私の声を聞こえないふりをした。

He made believe that he had not heard me.

docs.title: Warning
docs.text:
None

⚠️ 注意：本筆記的意思說明來自 JMdict 離線字典，文法分析（助動詞、文法模板）由規則程式自動產生，例句來自 Tatoeba 語料庫。內容僅供學習參考，建議重要詞彙以 Kotobank 或 Weblio 等權威來源進行確認。
